item.title: Taking no AfD prisoner
item.description: Kathrin Gebel’s apology was a classic deadpan political joke: “I have to apologize because I recently said nonsense in the Bundestag. The clitoris doesn’t have 3,000 nerve endings. It has 10,000.” She then says that confusing the number is understandable because women’s bodies and women’s health have long been neglected in research. She also adds that she wasn’t trying to compare Martin Reichardt to a vulva, because the vulva is strong and resilient—and her point was that he isn’t.
item.dc:creator: l0calh0st

item.title: 300 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 300
item.description:
Doing three hundred of these posts is kind of crazy, so I made it even crazier by posting 300 things.
I have 2 water cats ~u/K_D_1809 1/4
2/4
3/4
4/4
I'll make you both better.
After Bob Ross lost his wife to cancer and got diagnosed with lymphoma in the same month, he never lost his wholesome optimistic wisdom on life and how it relates to the joy of painting.
This grandfather's 94th birthday wish: to come over and give the cat rides.
Wholesome steam review
1 of 2
2 of 2
Photographed by Martin Schoeller for The New Yorker in 2002: "I was hired by the New Yorker in 2002 to photograph Robin Williams, and after doing my research what stood out most for me was that he was a very physical comedian. I came up with this idea to photograph him swinging from a chandelier in a grand hotel room. Most publicists shoot down these kinds of wild ideas, so I didn’t tell anyone what I was up to, but rigged up a chandelier at the Waldorf Astoria hotel for him to swing from. When Robin got there and saw what was happening, he lifted up his shirt and showed me this enormous scar on his shoulder. He’d just had surgery and couldn’t so much as lift his arm. He was so disappointed! He really felt bad about not being able to do it, because he loved the idea and really wanted to help me accomplish my vision. Unlike most Hollywood stars, he was unfazed by his success and position. He talked to everyone from stylists to the crew, to the hotel staff. We ended up asking a maid at the hotel to swing from the chandelier instead, and I asked him to just sit there and read a newspaper, which I think in the end was an even funnier, more unexpected picture.
I was born to park in my driveway and then went back to get some food
Dog wouldnt eat unless it saw the baby had food too
Comedian Ken Jeongs heartfelt message for his wife, Tran Ho, on their 20th wedding anniversary.
The little girl who lost her hair for the second time due to chemotherapy asked her mother to do her hair.
This old girl is 20 1 of 3
2 of 3
3 of 3
A dog was running after the ambulance that was taking his human. When the ambos realised it, he was let in.
The 1914 Christmas truce, which started with soldiers carolling to each other across no mans land, and resulted in gifts being exchanged and games of soccer being played. I think it shows that even bitter enemies are much more alike than they are different.
La Ritournelle ~Sébastien Tellier
From a simpler time
This handsome fella is 20
https://www.tsa.gov/canine-adoption-program

26 Man Tax: Adam Rodriguez
"What wisdom can you find that is greater than kindness?" - Jean Jacques Rousseau So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

So thankful that our timelines overlapped.

Naww

item.title: Consider it an order
item.description: WWII Veteran and Purple Heart recipient Robert Hilliard: "Next week I'll be 101 years old. In February 1944 when I was 18 years old I was inducted into the army and what they taught me to do there was to kill people who set up detention camps. Can you imagine how I felt earlier this year when they announced that one of the future detention camps would be at that same camp landing in Florida? We have a fascist, a fascist government, that allows innocent people to be put in detention camps and incarcerated."
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: More DNC mouthpieces coming out with a call to arms against Zohran an AOC, who could’ve guessed
item.description: What I hope people take from this and all the other moderate Dems sounding the alarm about the DSA is what doesn’t freak them out. The democrats getting slaughtered in 2024 doesn’t freak them out. Trump destroying huge parts of the government? Not that either. Imperialism and genocide? Barely a peep. BUT some young and exciting candidates that promise to actually make things better for YOU and not in some “incrementalism is the only way” BS, but REAL, immediate, and impactful change, THAT is what scares them. THAT is what will get them off the couch and force them to question their way of doing things. You can tell a lot about people by what does and doesn’t motivate them.
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

Let's get this bread.

So pretty.
